ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the block started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the block ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the block (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial within the block */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., bandit-task, choice-task) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "turk_code" TEXT /* Turk code for the participant */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the participant is assigned to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response was made for */,
  "choice" TEXT /* Choice made by the participant (e.g., risky, safe) */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the response (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., reward, penalty) */,
  "feedback_value" INTEGER /* Value of the feedback */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was given */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feedback (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the option is for */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (e.g., left, right) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was presented */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was removed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the option (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_options_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internal_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the node started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the node ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_elapsed" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time measurement */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the time is for */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed in milliseconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time measurement started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time measurement ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the time measurement (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_elapsed_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "analyst_email" TEXT /* Email of the analyst */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the analyst */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analyst was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analyst was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "administrator_email" TEXT /* Email of the administrator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES administrators ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
